title: Aniki Bóbó
writer: Manoel de Oliveira, João Rodrigues de Freitas, Nascimento Fernandes
actors: Nascimento Fernandes, Vital dos Santos, António Palma
plot: The story takes place in the old streets of Porto and by the banks of the Douro River. A gang of very young kids has just accepted a new member, Carlitos, a shy boy who has "played it tough" by stealing a doll in a shop. Carlitos ...
